sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95964" key="splagxnoto/mos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σπλαγχνο-τόμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n95964.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cutting up the</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σπλάγχνα</foreign>, epith. of Zeus in Cyprus. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1392.tlg001:30" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hegesand.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">30</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
